author: SantiMod
content:
@everyone 

 COMING SOON: The New Star Atlas Companion! 

Embark on an intergalactic adventure like never before with our Star Atlas Companion! Prepare to explore the cosmos and lead your spaceship crew to victory in an innovative move-to-play game experience.

With it, you'll be able to:

 Train your Spaceship Crew
 Walk, Run, and Cycle to Strengthen your Crew
 Help your Crew Achieve Fitness Levels and Earn Rewards
 Trade or Deploy Crew Members in the Game

Get ready to set a course for adventure with the new Star Atlas Companion! 

The app will be available on iOS and Android devices.
